title: Build a Cat Blog Page
description: A complete blog page for Mr. Whiskers the cat, built with semantic HTML. The page includes a header with a figure and nav links, a main section with About and Posts sections containing multiple articles, and a footer with a contact address that uses clickable phone and email links.
objectives: Use header, main, footer, and nav for full page structure
Use section, article, and aside as semantic content containers
Use figure and figcaption to caption an image
Create in-page anchor links using id attributes
Use the address element with tel: and mailto: links

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Welcome to Mr. Whiskers' Blog Page!

  • About
  • Posts
  • Contact

About

Hi there! I'm Jane Doe, a passionate writer who finds endless inspiration in the antics of my beloved cat, Mr. Whiskers.

His playful nature and boundless energy keeps me on my toes. I love him so much.
